allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
fix\(ads\): use plain <script async>, not next/script, for AdSense loader

next/script with strategy="beforeInteractive" in App Router does
not emit a literal <script async src=".../adsbygoogle.js"> tag in
the server HTML; it emits a <link rel="preload"> plus a
self.__next_s.push\([...]\) queue that Next''s runtime consumes after
hydration. AdSense''s verification crawler looks for the literal
script tag, so verification still failed despite the URL being
present in the markup.

React 19 has built-in support for hoisting plain <script async>
JSX elements to the document <head> as real <script async src>
markup. That''s exactly what AdSense expects, so swap next/script
for a plain <script> element. We also drop the id prop \(React 19
dedupes by src, which is what we want\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
